results.title: Tennessee lawmakers discuss voter representation, new congressional map at town hall
results.description: Tennessee lawmakers met with constituents in Memphis on Thursday to discuss what the recent congressional redistricting means for them.

results.title: Asian shares are mostly higher on hopes for a winding down of the Iran war
Asian shares are mostly higher on hopes for a winding down of the Iran war
results.description: Asian shares are mostly higher on expectations of a deal between the U.S. and Iran to extend their ceasefire in their war by 60 days. Oil prices slipped on optimism over a de-escalation of the...
